characters.appearance: Young woman in her 20s, slim build, fair complexion. She has long, straight blonde hair parted in the middle. Her facial features are soft with light makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue and white vertically striped button-down shirt with a white collar.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: चलो देखते हैं मेरी English pronunciation कैसी है। [Let's see how my English pronunciation is.]
Character A says: Vater. [Vater.]
Character A says: Oops, 'W' का sound ठीक नहीं था। [Oops, the 'W' sound wasn't right.]
Character A says: Let me try again. [Let me try again.]
Character A says: Water. [Water.]
Character A says: Oh wow! [Oh wow!]
Character A says: Supernova AI tutor ने मेरी गलती तुरंत सुधार दी! [The Supernova AI tutor corrected my mistake instantly!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by demonstrating a common pronunciation mistake.
- Shows the immediate, non-judgmental feedback loop of the app.
- Highlights the AI tutor feature in a relatable, encouraging way.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English pronunciation
0%
water
AI Tutor Feedback
Play Recording
Let me try again.
64%
water
Oh wow!
98%
water
Perfect!

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे Supernova की सबसे अच्छी बात ये लगती है कि आप बिना किसी झिझक के practice कर सकते हैं। [The best thing I like about Supernova is that you can practice without any hesitation.]
Character A says: इसमें AI tutor के साथ रोज़ाना real-world situations की practice होती है, जैसे interview या shopping. [It has daily practice of real-world situations with an AI tutor, like an interview or shopping.]
Character A says: अब English बोलने से डरना कैसा? [Why fear speaking English now?]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करें और confidence से English बोलें! [Download Supernova today and speak English with confidence!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shifts focus from native accents to practical, real-world confidence.
- Explains core features like AI tutor and situational practice.
- Delivers a strong, encouraging call to action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Practice without hesitation

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear end card with the brand logo.
- Reinforces the core value proposition of speaking confidently.
- Removes free trial messaging to align with Supernova's premium model.
